title: fritillaria lurida
intro: Fritillaria lurida, also known as the Yellow Meadow Fritillary or Yellow Fritillary, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family. It is a perennial bulbous geophyte with yellow or greenish-yellow flowers, native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Fritillaria lurida include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating coughs and sore throats, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions.
